channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Watch Kevin Morby and Carrie Brownstein Perform Sleater-Kinney’s “Modern Girl”
item.description: Rock out with Kevin Morby & Carrie Brownstein as they cover Sleater-Kinney's "Modern Girl" 🎸🎤 Let the good vibes roll!

item.title: Pop Montreal 2026 has Think About Life reunion, Nardwuar, High Vis, Luna, A Winged Victory for the Sullen, more
item.description: 🎶✨ Reuniting for a night of indie magic! Pop Montreal 2026 lineup unveiled with Think About Life, Nardwuar, and more! 🌟 #PopMontreal #IndieVibes

item.title: Westside Cowboy announce debut LP ‘It Goes On,’ share “Kick Stones (The Boys)”
item.description: 🎶 Saddle up for some fresh tunes! Westside Cowboy drops debut album ‘It Goes On’ with a wild new track! 🤠🎸 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Death From Above 1979 Announce “Private Lives Tour”
item.description: Buckle up for a wild ride! 🎸 @dfa1979 is hitting the road on the "Private Lives Tour"! 🚀 #DFA1979Tour

item.title: Kiwi Jr announce new album ‘Blowin’ Up’ & tour, share title track
item.description: 🎉 Kiwi Jr. dropping new album 'Blowin' Up' & hitting the road! 🚗🎶 Who's ready to jam? #KiwiJr #NewMusicAlert
